PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Goodson for Roger Boaz (Petitioner).

The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration appointing Roger Boaz as Successor Administrator (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $40,000.00 is required. The Court reminded Counsel that bond will need to be increased in the event additional assets are found.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Jensen in Propria Persona.

The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-07-2011 Continued To Sep-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Jensen in Propria Persona.

The matter was continued to September 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Jensen to provide an affidavit or declaration with regard to execution of the will.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
